raw_consumer_statement:
Hi, I am writing to formally dispute a transaction of {$2000.00} made on XX/XX/year> to XXXX XXXX via XXXX XXXX. 

I initially attempted to raise this dispute through the Citi mobile application ; however, I was prompted to contact customer care. Upon reaching out to customer care, I was informed that they were unable to initiate the dispute and was advised to contact this email address ( XXXX ) for further assistance. 

This payment was made for professional staffing and job placement services. As per the agreement, the vendor was expected to : 1. Prepare my resume 2. Actively apply to relevant job opportunities on my behalf 3. Secure interview opportunities 4. Conduct background verification and support the hiring process It has now been over 5 months since the payment was made : 1. I have received only one interview opportunity, and that too was merely an initial screening, which did not progress further 2. There has been no meaningful or sustained progress toward job placement Additionally, I have made multiple attempts to follow up with them via phone regarding the lack of results. However, they have consistently avoided addressing my concerns when asked about interview progress and deliverables, and have instead focused only on resume tweaking without delivering the agreed outcome.

Given that the primary purpose of the service ( job placement assistance with interviews ) has not been fulfilled, I believe this qualifies as services not rendered as agreed. The lack of performance became clear only after an extended period, which is why the issue could not have been reasonably identified or disputed within the initial dispute window.

In light of the above, I respectfully request Citi to : 1. Reconsider and initiate a good-faith dispute or investigation for this transaction 2. Assist in obtaining a refund for the amount charged I am happy to provide any additional documentation.

Thank you for your support and assistance in resolving this matter. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
